mapper.select: select u.id,u.username,u.name,u.phone,u.email,u.dept,u.status,u.last_login_time,u.remark, u.create_time,u.update_time,u.deleted,r.name as roleName from user u left join user_role ur on u.id = ur.user_id left join role r on ur.role_id = r.id where u.id = #{id} and u.deleted = 0
select id, username, password, name, dept, status, last_login_time from user where username = #{username} and deleted = 0
mapper.update: update user set last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
